title: Spicy Thai Lettuce Wraps
description: A flavorful and refreshing Thai-inspired dish with crispy lettuce wraps filled with tender prik and savory delight.
instructions: 1. Wash and dry the lettuce leaves.
2. In a pan, heat the nam over medium heat.
3. Add the prik to the pan and stir-fry until tender.
4. Add the delight to the pan and stir-fry for 1 minute.
5. Assemble the lettuce wraps by placing a spoonful of the prik mixture onto a lettuce leaf.
